businessBackground: Austin Engineering Limited (ASX: ANG) is the world's largest producer of customised dump truck bodies for the mining industry, designing and manufacturing per-customer engineered truck bodies (trays), excavator/dragline buckets, water tanks, tyre handlers, and ancillary mining equipment . The company has been operating for 40+ years (founded 1982 Brisbane) and currently builds ~500 trays annually at 6 operating sites across Australia (Perth, Mackay), Indonesia (Batam), USA (Casper, WY), and Chile (La Negra) plus 13 partner final-assembly companies globally . blindspots: **Chile new-contract absolute margin** — `[DATA GAP]` per THESIS. Renegotiation direction is positive (improved pricing + payment terms) but absolute segment-EBITDA margin under new terms is NOT disclosed. Will first be visible in Q4 FY26 segment reporting (Aug 2026 FY result).

**Canadian top-customer identity** — `[DATA GAP — inferred]`. Customer with A$510M new-truck-capex program that reduced body orders 22 → 42 → 0 across FY24-FY26. Inferred Suncor/CNRL/Imperial/Syncrude; not publicly confirmed. Affects concentration-risk assessment.
**Schlam / USCO ITR pricing vs ANG on live tenders** — `[DATA GAP]`. Competitive pressure is known, but tender-level pricing not disclosed. Proxy: any ANG share-loss commentary on H2 FY26 call.

**Hidden subcontractor exposure in NA** — `[DATA GAP — partial]`. FY25 subcontractor costs doubled A$30.5M → A$73.4M. Permanent-staff transition hiring underway; absolute-dollar trajectory in H2 FY26 is the proof point.

**Singleton 5.3% NED stake intent** — `[DATA GAP]`. Former chair retained 5.3% post-handover; intent (long-term hold / gradual sell) unclear. Not currently a forced-seller, but a >1% reduction would be a watch-item.

noiseFilter: **Single-month iron ore / copper price moves** — ANG revenue is truck-body capex exposure, which is 6-24 month lagged to commodity prices. Only sustained (2+ quarters) directional commodity moves that show up in Rio/BHP/FMG capex-guidance revisions (#4) are structural.

**<A$500k daily volume moves** — ANG is illiquid micro-cap (AUD ~121M mcap at A$0.195). Intra-day 5-10% moves on <A$500k volume = retail + microcap-fund noise. Only volume >A$2M or sustained 5-day flow signals institutional repositioning.

**Wilson Asset Management residual selling** — Wilson AM exited A$15.66M / 54.4M shares Aug 2025 at ~A$0.31. Cross-check 2026-04-20: Wilson AM also ceased Gentrack, PointsBet, Australian Clinical Labs, AI-Media, EML in 2025 = broader microcap rotation pattern, NOT an ANG-specific thesis break. Only a new large institutional seller (not Wilson) crossing >3% would be structural.

**Individual customer deferrals below Grasberg-scale** — Orders from any single mine-site customer can be deferred 1-2 quarters on routine operational or safety issues. Only an event on Grasberg's scale (forced outage + FM + deaths) or a top-5 customer deferring >A$15M = structural.
**Analyst PT moves** — Rule 17: Bell Potter PT A$0.45 tracked as "market-state context" only. Do NOT anchor FV to it. Own FV A$0.282 PW comes from destination-state × peer multiples.

**COO D'Rozario option expiry behavior (Apr 2026)** — 5M options @ A$0.35 strike expire 12 Apr 2026; most tranches likely worthless at current A$0.195. Expiry is mechanical. Not an insider-sell signal.
